title: JUNIPERO SERRA PLAYGROUND & CLUBHOUSE
content: “Parking: lots of free street parking Line: not very crowded on weekends Service: fairly clean Nice little park in a nice neighborhood.” Mentioned in 3 reviews.

title: Junipero Serra Playground Park - San Francisco
content: It's a beautiful park that has public washrooms. There's tennis courts and basketball courts right beside but it's well gated so to not hurt the children.
